questions.question: Define digital system. Explain why digital systems are preferred in modern communication systems.
Perform the following subtraction as indicated: (i) (4321)₁₀ - (1234)₁₀ Using 9's complement  (ii) (11011)₂ - (1010)₂ Using 2's complement

Design and implement full adder circuit using decoder.

Define positive and negative logic system. "Digital circuits are easier to design than analog circuit." Do you agree with this statement? Give reasons to support your answer.
Find the value of X: (i) (777)_x = (212)₈  (ii) (DEC)_H = (0101)_x  (iii) (563)₇ = (X)₃  (iv) (100111)_Gray = (X)_Binary
State and Prove De-Morgan's Theorem. List out the factors to be considered while constructing the Logic Gates.
What is Don't care condition? Simplify given function using K-map with circuit design. F(W,X,Y,Z) = Σ(1,4,5,6,12,14,15) and don't care condition D(W,X,Y,Z) = Σ(10,11).
Define universal gate. Design the three bit EX-OR circuit using only Universal gates.
Design a combinational circuit that accepts a 3 bit number as input and generates the output binary number equal to the 2's complement of input number.
Show how a full adder can be converted to a full substractor with the addition of one inverter circuit.
Implement the following: (i) F(A,B,C) = Σ(1,3,5,6) (using MUX)  (ii) F1 = Σ(0,2,5), F2 = Σ(3,4,7), F3 = Σ(6,7) (using ROM)
Realize the following state diagram into a circuit using j-k flip-flop.
questions.fig_description: State diagram with 4 states (00, 01, 10, 11). From 00: 1/0 → 01, 0/0 → 10. From 01: v1 self-loop, d1 → 11. From 10: 0/0 self-loop, 1/0 → 11. From 11: d1 → goes back. (Mealy machine type)

questions.question: Describe read and write operation in RAM with diagram. Draw a circuit for 6-bit SIPO shift register.

Design an arithmetic circuit with one selection variable and two data inputs A and B. When S=0, the circuit performs the addition operation F=A+B; when S=1, the circuit performs the increment operation F=A+1 (only show the block diagram).
Design a 4-bit arithmetic circuits which performs eight different arithmetic operations.
Define analog and digital systems. Which system do you prefer and why?
Subtract (100101)₂ from (1111101)₂ using 2's complement method. Also subtract (7729)₁₀ - (842.4)₁₀ using 9's complement.
Explain the universal property of NOR gate with appropriate logic gates.
Design a logic circuit to implement the Boolean function F(A,B,C,D) = Σ(1,3,7,11,15) with D(A,B,C,D) = Σ(0,2,5) in the term of: (i) Sum of products  (ii) Implement with NAND-NAND gate only
Design a combinational circuit with four input lines that represent a decimal digit in BCD and four output lines that generate the 9's complement of the input digit.
questions.or: Design a combinational circuit which takes three input numbers and produces an output equal to square of the input.

questions.question: A combinational circuit is defined by the following three functions: F₁ = x'y' + xyz'  F₂ = x' + y  F₃ = xy + x'y'. Design the circuit with a decoder and external gates.
Give the truth table logic circuit and characteristic equation of J-K flip flop. How it can be converted into T flip flop.
Design a counter with the following binary sequence 0, 1, 3, 2, 6, 4, 5, 7 and repeat. Use T flip flop.
Design an adder/substractor circuit with one selection variable S and two inputs A and B. When S=0 the circuit performs A+B when S=1 the circuit performs A-B by taking the 2's complement of B.
What is PLA? Derive the programming table for the combinational circuit that squares a 3-bit input number.
Explain in brief about: (i) Gray code  (ii) Modulo 2 system.
Differentiate between synchronous and asynchronous logic.
What do you understand by output hazard races?
Describe in brief why most of system in the present days has been converted to digital rather than analog.
"8 4 -2 -1 code is self-complementing code." Justify this statement.
Perform the following subtraction: (i) (34)₈ - (27)₈, convert the given number into binary and perform subtraction using 2's complement.  (ii) Determine the value of base x if (321)_x = (57)₈
Design even parity generator when a 3 bit message contains cyclic code.
Reduce the given expression in minimum number of literals using Boolean algebra and derive the truth table and implement in NAND logic. A+B[AC+B{AC+(B+C')D}]

A logic circuit implements the following Boolean function F = A'C + AC'D'. It is found that the circuit input combination A=C=1 can never occur. Using K-map with proper don't care conditions, find a simplified expression and implement it using NAND gates only.
Derive a PLA program table for the combinational circuit that squares 3 bit number minimize the number of product term.
Differentiate between PLA and ROM. Implement the given four Boolean function using 8×4 PLA: A(x,y,z) = Σ(1,2,4,6); B(x,y,z) = Σ(0,1,6,7); C(x,y,z) = Σ(2,6); D(x,y,z) = Σ(1,2,3,5,7)
Explain in detail about the positive edge triggered J-K flip-flop. Write its advantage over S-R flip-flop.
With suitable example explain about state reduction and assignment. Also, write the advantages of state reduction and assignment.
What is shift register? Explain the operation of serial-In serial out shift register with its circuit diagram and timing diagram.
Design a 3 bit synchronous binary up counter using JK flip-flop.
Design a 4-bit arithmetic circuits which performs eight different operations. What do you mean by 'Output Hazard Races'? With the help of diagram explain how Read/Write operation is performed in RAM.
User's complement to subtract the following: (i) (00101101)₂ - (10110101)₂  (ii) (835701)₁₀ - (569812)₁₀
Compare and contrast digital system with analog system.
Explain the parity method of error detection with a suitable example.
Realize all the basic gates using NOR gate only.
Distinguish between minterms and maxterms.
What is processor unit? Draw it's block diagram.
Simplify the following Boolean function: F(W,X,Y,Z) = Σ(1,6,7,8,11,13) with don't care condition d(W,X,Y,Z) = Σ(0,2,3,4,10,12) and then implement the function using NOR gates only.
Design a code conversion circuit which converts BCD to excess-3 code.
questions.or: Design a code converter circuit to convert 8, 4,-1,-2 code to gray codes.

questions.question: Design a full Subtractor using two 4×1 MUX.
questions.or: Implement the following function using 8×1 multiplexer: Y(A,B,C,D) = Σ(0,1,2,5,9,11,13,15)

questions.question: Explain the following: (i) Synchronous and asynchronous logic  (ii) Combinational and sequential logic
Explain the operation of a J-K flip flop along with it's characteristic table. Write down it's characteristic equation and graphic symbol. What are the drawback of R-S flip flop?
Design 4 bit updown counter using T flip flop.
Describe the operation of a four bit shifter with a neat diagram.
Discuss the purpose of shift register. Explain serial in parallel out and parallel in parallel out shift register.

questions.instruction: Write short notes on any two: 2×5

questions.question: Compare and contrast analog and digital system.
Compute any four of the followings as indicated: (i) (11101)_gray = ()₂  (ii) (706)₈ = ()₁₆  (iii) (512)₁₀ = ()₈  (iv) (110110.101)₂ = ()₁₀  (v) (3FAFE.1BA)₁₆ = ()₁₀
Perform the following operation using BCD method: (i) 689 - 354  (ii) 496 + 825
Discuss in brief about gray code.
Explain the parity method of error detection with a suitable example.
Discuss the universal property of NAND and realize all the basic gates using NAND gate only.
Use K-map to simplify the given Boolean function in POS and implement the simplified function using NOR gate only. F(A, B, C, D) = Σ(1,3,8,9,12,13,14,15), and don't care d(A, B, C, D) = Σ(2,7,10)
Design a code converter circuit which converts 8 4-2-1 code to binary.
questions.or: Design a circuit diagram to generate and check the Odd Parity.

questions.question: Derive a PLA program table for the combinational circuit that squares 3 bit number.
questions.or: Implement the following Boolean functions using multiplexer: (i) F(w, x, y, z) = Σ(0, 1, 3, 4, 5, 8, 9, 15)  (ii) F(x, y) = Σ(1, 2, 3). Also draw the internal circuit of the resulting multiplexer.

questions.question: What is a shift register? With the help of timing diagram explain the operation of serial-in-serial-out shift register.
What are the basic differences between combinational and sequential logic circuits? Explain the operation of a T flip-flop.
Design an arithmetic circuit with two selection variables S₁ and S₀ that generates the following arithmetic operations.
Design a 3-bit synchronous gray code up counter using D flip-flop.
questions.or: Design a 4 bit gray code synchronous counter using T flip-flop.

questions.question: Compare analog and digital system. Which one is better and why?
Use r's complement to subtract the following: (i) (100)₂ - (110000)₂  (ii) (7850)₁₀ - (7650)₁₀
What do you mean by alphanumerical code? "Excess-3 codes are called self complementing code". Explain it.
Simplify the Boolean function F and don't care conditions d in (1) SOP (2) POS and (3) draw NAND-NAND equivalent logic. Given: F = A'B'D' + A'CD + A'BC  and  d = A'BC'D + ACD + AB'D'
Design a code converter circuit which converts 8 4 -2 -1 code to binary.
Design a circuit that compares two 3 bit numbers A and B to check if they are equal. The circuit has one output 'y' so that y = 1 if A = B and y = 0 if A ≠ B.
questions.or: Design a combinational circuit using a ROM. The circuit accepts a 3 bit numbers and generates an output binary number equal to the sum of the input numbers.

questions.question: What is multiplexer? Describe 4:1 multiplexer with internal diagram.
Differentiate between combinational and sequential logic circuit.
Implement a full adder using 3×8 decoder and OR gates.
Give the truth table, logic diagram and characteristics equation of J-K flip flop.
Define shift registers. Explain operation of parallel in parallel out shift register.
Design a 3-bit synchronous binary counter using T-flip-flop.
Design a 4-bit arithmetic circuits which performs eight different arithmetic operations.
Design a 4-bit combinational logic shifter and explain it.

questions.instruction: Write short notes on any two: 2×5

questions.question: Perform the operation as indicated: (i) (1010)_gray = (.....)₂  (ii) (2EB.7A)₁₆ = (.......)₁₀  (iii) (225.225)₁₀ = (.........)₂  (iv) (237.5)₈ = (...........)₁₆
Describe the parity method of error detection with a suitable four bit system example. Also, write down its limitations.
Explain the NAND gate as an universal gates.
Reduce the expression F(A, B, C, D) = Σ(0, 6, 8, 13, 14) and d(A, B, C, D) = Σ(2, 4, 10). Express the simplified function in sum of minterms.
Design a combinational circuit with three inputs and one output. The output is equal to logic 1 when the binary value of the input is less than 3. The output is logic 0 otherwise.
questions.or: Design a binary to gray code converter circuit using the minimum number of logic gates. Use the four variable input and four variable output case.

questions.question: Implement the following function with a multiplexer: F = (A,B,C,D) = Σ(0,1,3,4,8,9,15)
questions.or: A combinational circuit is defined by the following three functions: F1 = x'y' + xyz'  F2 = x' + y  F3 = xy + x'y'. Design the circuit with decoder and external gates.

questions.question: What is the major difference between the synchronous and asynchronous logic? Explain about the JK flip flop with respect to truth table, k-map and characteristic equation.
What do you mean shift register? Explain about parallel in parallel out shift register.
Explain the operation of D flip-flop with the help of the truth table, logic diagram and characteristic equation.
Explain briefly about status register.
State and prove De-Morgan's theorem.
Design a 4 bit arithmetic circuit.
Design a 3 bit up down synchronous counter using JK flip flop which is capable of counting the both up and down sequences as desired by user.

questions.instruction: Write short notes on any two: 2×5

questions.question: Define analog and digital Systems. Which system do you prefer and why?
Use r's complement to subtract the following: (i) (100010)₂ - (10101)₂  (ii) (3857)₁₀ - (1250)₁₀
"Excess-3 code is self complementing code", how?
Find the complement of F = X + YZ; then show that F.F' = 0 and F + F' = 1
Simplify the following Boolean function to minimum no of literal f = AB' + B'C' + A'C'. Implement the reduced form with basic gates and NAND gate only.
A Boolean function is given: F(A,B,C,D) = Σ(1,4,5,6,12,14,15) and don't care condition d(A,B,C,D) = Σ(10,11). Simplify it using K-map. Replace all the gates with NAND gate only.
Design a combinational logic whose output is the 2's complement of the input number.
Draw the truth table for full adder. Implement full adder using two 4:1 MUX.
Explain the operation of JK flip-flop with the help of characteristics table. How it can be converted into T-flip-flop?
Realize the following state diagram into a circuit using J-K flip-flop.
What is register? What is its use? Briefly explain the operation of serial-in-serial-out shift register using timing diagram.
Draw the block diagram of ALU and explain it.
Design a 4-bit arithmetic circuits which performs eight different arithmetic operations.
Perform the following operations: (i) (10101)_gray = ()₂  (ii) (756)₈ = ()₁₆  (iii) (256)₁₀ = ()₈  (iv) (11011.111)₂ = ()₁₀  (v) (3A.CD)₁₆ = ()₁₀
Perform the following subtraction using r's complement method: (i) (2569)₁₀ - (4382)₁₀  (ii) (1010)₂ - (1100)₂
"Excess-3 code is a self-complementing code". Justify it.
Find the complement of F = X + YZ; then show that F.F' = 0 and F + F' = 1

Use K-map to simplify the given function and draw the logic diagram F(w,x,y,z) = Σ(0,1,2,3,7,8,10) and the don't care conditions: d(w,x,y,z) = Σ(5,6,11,15). Implement the simplified function using NAND gates only.
Design a code converter circuit which converts 8 4 -2 -1 code to binary.
Show how a full adder can be converted to a full substractor with the addition of one inverter circuit.
Design the 4 bit comparator circuit which compare two numbers A and B either A<B, A>B or A=B.
What is multiplexer? Describe 4:1 multiplexer with internal diagram.

Present the truth table, logic diagram and characteristics equation of J-K flip flop.

Design a 4-bit arithmetic circuit and show its function table.
